comparison_to_v1: Clear improvement over v1 (88). Introduction follows an explicit 3-step argument: (1) ultra-large libraries open opportunity, (2) efficiency strategies exist but rest on underlying docker accuracy, (3) open + accurate + flexible + AI-triaged is the missing combination. Results narrative is strongly scaffolded: each subsection closes with an explicit handoff to the next ('With the platform in place, we next turned to quantitative benchmarks...', 'With the benchmarks established, we next asked whether...', 'Having validated the platform on a soluble ubiquitin-ligase pocket, we turned to...'). Discussion is 7 paragraphs covering: summary of results, force-field design choices, positioning vs prior platforms, generality across biological regimes, limitations, future directions, and broader significance. No \input{} seams; unified technical-scientific voice. Tables (CASF, KLHDC2 campaign, NaV1.7 campaign, NaV1.7 IC50) are denser and more quantitative than v1's. Citations well-integrated with clear rhetorical role each. Solid v2 uplift, especially in writing/clarity/completeness.
brief_notes: Every checked number reproduces source: EF1% 16.72 vs 11.9, KLHDC2 Enamine REAL ~5.5B compounds / ~6M docked / 0.11% / 10 iterations / -6.81 to -12.43 kcal/mol / 50,000 VSH / 54 cluster reps / 37 selected / 29 synthesised / 7 hits / 14% / 381,567 focused; NaV1.7 ZINC22 4.1B / 4.5M docked / 7 iterations / -10.8 to -18.2 kcal/mol / 100,000 VSH / 160 examined / 10 selected / 9 synthesised / 4 hits / 44.4% / 1.32 uM Z8739902234 / 2.23 uM Z8739905023 / resting 13.1 / NaV1.5 5.14 / hERG 6.27 / Tanimoto <0.33 / 2.0 A co-crystal; 3000-CPU cluster, 1 RTX2080, <7 days. Unified voice throughout, genuinely deep 7-paragraph Discussion with distinct rhetorical purpose per paragraph. Figures include pipeline schematic + convergence curves + IC50 bars - more data-rich than many generated papers. Paper is polished and competitive with v1 while exceeding it on writing and completeness axes.
